payload.topic: AgenticMarketingPro Niche Positioning and Ideal Customer Profile
payload.target_audience: Growth-stage B2B SaaS, digital agencies, e-commerce brands, fractional CMOs
payload.prompt_override: Create a COMPREHENSIVE niche positioning document for AgenticMarketingPro. Include: 1) Category of One positioning statement, 2) 4 detailed ICP profiles with psychographics, pain points, and triggers, 3) Key messaging themes with pain-first and outcome-first headlines, 4) Competitive differentiation matrix, 5) Pricing and packaging recommendations, 6) Unfair advantage analysis. Context: AgenticMarketingPro is an AI-powered marketing OS that replaces a 10-person marketing team with coordinated AI agents delivering SEO, content, ads, and analytics at agency quality, SaaS cost.
